description: Composition Black and grey striped polo jersey made of Dri-Fit 100% cotton, has a spread ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, appliquéd club badge on the left chest, embroidered swoosh logo on the right chest, and branding on the left vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Line dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Bask in greatness with this manchester united football Club Soccer jersey from nike. This jersey pays homage to the incredibly successful team with strong design details including the team colours and club badge. The Dri-Fit performance fabric ensures breathability and comfort on and off the field.
